checks.label: SC#6 phase13_live_smoke_help (SMOKE-05/06 runner CLI)
checks.stdout_tail:
usage: phase13_live_smoke.py [-h] [--live] [--max-attempts MAX_ATTEMPTS]
                             [--budget-cap-usd BUDGET_CAP_USD]
                             [--session-id SESSION_ID]
                             [--state-root STATE_ROOT] [--verbose-compression]
                             [--log-level LOG_LEVEL]

Phase 13 Live Smoke — full E2E real API smoke + evidence chain.
phase11_full_run.py clone + Wave 0~3 wire. Default dry-run ($0). Pass --live
로만 실 과금 진입 (대표님 승인 후).

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --live                Real API calls. Default: dry-run mode ($0 preview).
                        Requires env: TYPECAST_API_KEY + GOOGLE_API_KEY +
                        FAL_KEY/KLING_API_KEY. Cost bounded ≤ --budget-cap-usd
                        (default $5.00).
  --max-attempts MAX_ATTEMPTS
                        Retry attempts on mid-run failure (default 2). Budget
                        cap is cumulative across attempts (Research Open Q
                        #2).
  --budget-cap-usd BUDGET_CAP_USD
                        Hard cost cap USD (default $5.00). SMOKE-05 invariant.
                        BudgetExceededError → exit 5.
  --session-id SESSION_ID
                        Session identifier (default: yyyyMMdd_HHMMSS).
  --state-root STATE_ROOT
                        Checkpointer state directory (default: state).
  --verbose-compression
                        Dump raw supervisor payload pre-compression to
                        evidence (Research Open Q #6 ad-hoc forensic mode).
  --log-level LOG_LEVEL
                        Python logging level (default: INFO).
